label: Michael Lazarus - NYC Council Graphics Designer

profile.profile_text:
Name: Michael Lazarus

Current Status: Early stage professional (< 5 years)
University: FSU
Job Type Preference: Full Time Role

Primary Roles: Graphic Designer focused on building brand identity and visual systems for startups, media, and consumer facing brands. Executes consistent design across campaigns, rebrands, and launch materials within marketing led teams.
Secondary Roles: n/a

Target Companies: any company that really focuses on creatives.
Are You Open To Non Obvious Entry Points: Somewhat open
Preferred Locations: 1st preference is NYC 2nd preference is East Coast

Timeline: Immediate
Feedback Style: Balanced (honest but encouraging)

Other Concerns: finding the right opportunity, competition, uncertainty
Strengths: thrive on collaboration, strength in listening and interpretation. Likes to be creative and participate in creative strategy.
profile.resume_text:
MICHAEL LAZARUS
Graphic Designer
Brooklyn, NY | 561 322 8400 | mikelazdesign@gmail.com | mikelazdesign.com | linkedin.com/in/mlaz

DESIGN FOCUS SUMMARY
Graphic Designer focused on building brand identity and visual systems for startups, media, and consumer facing brands. Executes consistent design across campaigns, rebrands, and launch materials within marketing led teams.

CORE DESIGN CAPABILITIES
Brand identity and visual systems | Brand guidelines and visual direction | Marketing and campaign design | Digital and print production | Social media and paid ad creative | Photography and videography | Pitch decks and sales collateral | Cross functional collaboration

TOOLS
Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign | Canva | Figma (light) | Asana | Monday.com | Microsoft Office | Google Workspace

SELECTED DESIGN EXPERIENCE

Designed end-to-end brand identity and visual systems including logos, typography, color palettes, and layout standards for two related tax service brands
Produced pitch decks, trade show booths, banners, and print collateral used across sales and marketing initiatives
Designed paid ad creative and social media assets supporting lead generation campaigns
Partnered with marketing leadership to gather requirements and manage multiple concurrent design deliverables
Prepared production ready files and coordinated with print vendors to ensure accurate execution

Multimedia Designer | Music Choice | 2022 ñ 2023
Designed themed visual assets for cable television channels and streaming app experiences
Created thumbnails, photo collages, and branded backgrounds for campaign driven content
Produced social media graphics for Instagram and Facebook
Collaborated with marketing, streaming, and IT teams to maintain visual consistency across platforms

Graphic Designer | Liberty Health Sciences | 2020 ñ 2021
Designed in store signage and educational infographics for cannabis retail locations
Built and maintained a live digital menu displaying product and strain information

Brand Identity Coordinator | Two Degrees App | 2019 ñ 2020
Supported brand development for an early stage consumer app across digital and physical touchpoints
Designed marketing assets and contributed to visual guidelines used across the platform

Graphic Designer / Bulk Orders Lead | DivvyUp Socks | 2018 ñ 2019
Designed custom product graphics and edited customer submitted photography for large quantity orders
Served as primary design contact for corporate clients from concept through production

EARLY DESIGN EXPERIENCE
Grova Creative Marketing | Graphic Design Intern | 2018
Florida State University Division of Student Affairs | Intern | Graphic Designer | Sr. Graphic Design | 2015 - 2018
Designed promotional materials and event assets for agency and university clients
Supported campaigns, events, and branded communications

ADDITIONAL EXPERIENCE
Brooklyn Brewery | Bartender | 2024 ñ Present
Customer facing role in a high traffic hospitality environment

EDUCATION
Florida State University | Associate degree coursework in Studio Art
Dreyfoos School of the Arts | Digital Media coursework

jobText:
The New York City Council, an equal opportunity employer, is seeking a Graphics Designer to serve in the Community Engagement Division.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
Design and revision of specific graphics projects such as fliers, newsletters, signage, brochures, stationery, postcards, etc.
Production of event materials (invitations, signage, planning tools, etc.) in a timely manner.
Participation in the planning and production of events (meeting attendance, determination and documenting of graphics needs, monitoring of related progress).
Regular reporting on personal workflow and status of all projects.
Perform other duties, as assigned.

QUALIFICATIONS:
Bachelorís degree preferred. Minimum of four yearsí experience required.
Proficiency and creativity in Adobe Suite tools such as InDesign, Illustrator, and Photoshop are required. Working knowledge of Canva helpful.
Able to supply portfolio of past work/demonstrate skills.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite ñ especially Word and Excel.
Must be organized with the ability to create and maintain personal organization/tracking tools as needed.
Ability to manage time wisely and balance numerous projects at a time with care and attention to detail.
Ability to work well on tight deadlines.
Deep understanding of Typography and Color Theory
Team player with a willingness to share responsibilities with others.
Self-starter with a demonstrated track record of showing initiative to move projects forward.
Broad, sophisticated communication and interpersonal skills.
Fast learner with interest in learning new skills while polishing existing ones.
Multilingual skills a plus.
Ability to work flexible hours, as needed.
